Natively customer onboarding checklist

Step 1: Install desktop app and grant screen-recording permission.
Step 2: Grant microphone permission.
Step 3: Add at least one model provider API key (Gemini, OpenAI, or Claude).
Step 4: Step 4 requires audio device approval — pick your mic and system-audio source under Settings → Audio.
Step 5: Optionally upload a resume to enable Profile Intelligence (Pro).
Step 6: Start your first meeting to verify capture and live answers.
